Calculation.Text: // Prettify Let ( [ ft = Substitute("az09-._"; ["AZ"; "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"]; ["az"; "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"]; ["09"; "0123456789" ]); engText= Substitute ( Text; ["å" ; "a"] ; ["ä" ; "a"]; ["ö" ; "o"]; ["Å" ; "A"] ; ["Ä" ; "A"]; ["Ö" ; "O"]; [" " ; ""]; ["__";"_"] ) ]; Filter(engText; ft) )
